title: Level 188.2
wikitext:
{{Headerbox|file=Level_188.2.png|header='''Insanity itself is forgotten…'''}} {{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 188.2: "The Hollow Atrium"}}{{Class 2|class=2|safety=Unsafe|security=Stable|entity=Moderate Entity Count|hexagon=2}} [[File:Level_188.2.png|thumb|396x396px|The only known image of Level 188.2. The reflection of the photographer is shown reflected on a non-predatory window.]] == Description == '''Level 188.2''', known as '''“The Hollow Atrium”''', is a sublevel of [[Level 188]] and resembles a dark building with a semi-cylindrical greenhouse in the center of the interior. It also consists of dilapidated hallways of a similar concrete appearance. The hallway is narrow and filled with extremely ordered doors on either side; however, most are locked with no apparent or currently documented means of entry. Other doors lead to nearly empty rooms, sometimes with bottled [[Object 1|Almond Water]] and a non-predatory window with working blinds. These rooms always face towards the interior zone. Each floor has a stairway somewhere leading to the next floor. The building itself has an unknown number of floors, as standing in the open interior zone and staring up usually renders the building with 10-20 floors, while ascending the stairs never yields an inherent top floor. However, the space itself is Euclidean. The interior zone of '''Level 188.2''' is surrounded by four walls, each with six pitch-black windows on each floor. Most are assumed to be [[Entity 2|Predatory Windows]], though they have strange behavior in consideration of the fact they do not seem to attack as opportunistically as in other levels, thus leading to another relatively common consensus of them being Innocuous or simply regular windows, with no documented attacks. The interior area has a moist grass-like floor, and it is recommended to go against drinking the liquid due to the abundance of bottled Almond Water in this level. In the center of the interior area is a greenhouse with a semi-cylindrical structure. Inside are different forms of undocumented plant life, though it is unknown how they grow. Many [[Entity 8|Hounds]] that inhabit the greenhouse feed off the vegetation; thus, wanderers should remain wary of dangers when exploring it. '''Level 188.2''' itself is on average a cool 15-20°C, or 59-68°F, though the greenhouse is extremely volatile, and temperatures can reach over 50°C (122°F) for no reason that is universally agreed upon. The primary hypothesis suggests it being part of an automated system for vegetation propagation, supported with the synchronized release of the strong and sweet smell of almond water. Almond Water found uncapped is not to be drunk, for it has most certainly been refilled with [[Object 12|Liquid Pain]]. == Entities == There is an absence of '''Wretches''' in this level. ==== [[Entity 8|'''Hounds''']] ==== Hounds are found only in the Greenhouse section of the level, where they feed on the plant matter, never seeming to leave. Thus, it is generally recommended to avoid entering the Greenhouse; in case of an attack, leaving the Greenhouse often allows the wanderer to escape to safety. ==== [[Entity 10|'''Skin-Stealers''']] ==== Skin-Stealers are found to roam the halls of the building, with their population density decreasing on higher floors. Most are in their true forms, though an occasional few are disguised. Due to the narrow and cramped nature of the hallways in which they reside, it is generally recommended to immediately start retreating upon hearing footsteps that are not one’s own. Outrunning them is not a possibility. ==== [[Entity 2|'''Predatory Windows (?)''']] ==== The presence of Predatory Windows in this level is assumed but unconfirmed. In any case, a wanderer should not come into close proximity to a window except one with blinds, for those have demonstrated themselves to be devoid of any danger. == Colonies and Outposts == The only confirmed group on this level consists of 3 people, who scavenge higher rooms for resources such as Almond Water. They are open to trading and are safe to approach due to there being no Skin-Stealers on the high floor they reside on. It is unknown which floor exactly they reside on. ''They don’t talk much…'' == Addenda == {{Collapse|num=1|initial=+ Group: Conversation Transcript|final=- Group: Conversation Transcript|body=
'''''Anonymous''''': Hey, uh, I would just like to have a quick conversation with you to gather information on the level, yeah? That fine with you guys? '''''Subject A''''': *slight nod* '''''Anonymous''''': Alright, great! So, could you describe, sort of, any information on entities throughout this level? '''''Subject B''''': Roaming the halls. Only here is safe. '''''Anonymous''''': Alright... that's great... what types of entities? '''''Subject C''''': Look-alikes, and the ones which don't. '''''Anonymous''''': So... Skin-Stealers... yeah, I've seen em. How about the Greenhouse, how about that? '''''*silence*''''' '''''Anonymous''''': How bout it? '''''Subject C''''': We wish not to speak upon this matter. '''''Anonymous''''': Ok, got it... how about the resources? That you're ok on speaking about, yeah? '''''Subject B''''': Water, sweet. The sole reason we have not... Water, sweet. '''''Anonymous''''': ...so, almond water. Oh, that must explain why there are no Wre- '''''Subject C''''': DO NOT SPEAK OF THIS. '''''Anonymous''''': Ok, ok, sheesh. Uh, hmmm... any exits? '''''*silence*''''' '''Anonymous''': Uh, any exits? '''''Subject B''''': No, no, the sweet water is the only reason we have not... Water, sweet. '''''Subject A''''': *slight shaking of head* '''Anonymous''': Ok, uh... I think that's all I need, I'll just get going now, uh, thanks for the information. Much appreciated. '''''[END OF TRANSCRIPT]'''''
}} {{Collapse|num=2|initial=+ Greenhouse Note|final=- Greenhouse Note|body= ''Level 188.2'' From Level 188, my friend and I just stood in the center of the whole damn place. Just, thinking. What a way we came. And then, for a moment, I had lost the idea of the fragility of life… By some stroke of unluckiness, we ended up in a weird sublevel. It was new, full of possibilities, now that I think of it, unlike ████████████ now. Because he’s ████████████, and I can’t even see him anymore, not even as a freaking WRETCH, because he, just… the thought horrifies me. We were soon of the ones who resided in the void itself above. We gathered almond water, and we drank. We got food, and we ate. Yet somehow, one day he, he just disappeared. And all I saw from then was his walking towards the house of greenery and, when I dared to follow behind, the horrific sight, his ████████████, came to upon my eyes. What I saw was not a man, not a wretch, but sinstead, hes.. all I saw was what did I see? Something?nothing?theplantshad ████████████him he was ████████████ And yet I traversed on, I did. I shall bring this note to the deepest part of the next level I enter. This is the last, I hope, I will ever even grasp the idea of the existence of this level in my mind for the rest of my miserable life and, should I ever see this message ever again, I shall walk into the greenhouse itself and suffer the same fate of ████████████ as my friend himself has suffered. }} == Entrances and Exits == ==== '''Entrances''' ==== * Standing in the center of [[Level 188]]’s courtyard for an extended period of time may lead one into this level. * Watering any plant life on [[Level 189]] with [[Almond Water]] will bring the wanderer to a random low floor on this level. ==== '''Exits''' ==== * Falling off a stairwell can lead one into [[Level 36]]. * Repeatedly opening and shutting a door can eventually have it pull the wanderer in and drop them into a random apartment in [[Level 84]]. {{VoidedThemeV2}} [[Category:Sub-Levels]] [[Category:Levels]] [[Category:Unsafe Levels]]
